top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.type = 'expansion' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM sets s
INNER JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN s.type = 'expansion' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_expansion
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.type = 'expansion' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM sets s
INNER JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.type = 'expansion' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_expansion
FROM sets s
INNER JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN s.type = 'expansion' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_expansion
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Japanese';

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.type = 'expansion' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM sets s
INNER JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.type = 'expansion' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_expansion
FROM sets s
INNER JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN s.type = 'expansion' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_expansion
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Japanese';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN s.type = 'expansion' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM sets s
INNER JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Japanese';
